title: TipSubmission
description: A tip, case inquiry, or records (FOIL) request submitted TO the Queens County DA. NET-NEW: there is NO write surface on queensda.org today — the only inbound channels are a phone number, a static 'Contact Us' page, and a manual Freedom of Information Law (FOIL) request. This schema serves both the write surface (submit a tip / cold-case lead / FOIL request) and the read-back surface (check the status of your own submission).

submissionId.description: Server-assigned reference number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status, set by the office, not the submitter.

type.description: What kind of submission this is.

details.description: Free-text tip / inquiry / records request body.

relatedNamusId.description: For a cold-case lead, the NamUs case number it relates to.

incidentDate.description: Date of the incident, if relevant.

anonymous.description: Submit without contact details. Tips may be anonymous; FOIL requests generally cannot.
